The '''''Star Wars Technical Journal''''' is a reference title that collects the [[Starlog Communications International]] [[The Official Star Wars Technical Journal|magazine series]] of the same name. It was first published in paperback format by [[Boxtree]] in the United Kingdom on [[March 31]], [[1995]],<ref name="Amazon-Boxtree" /> and subsequently in hardcover by [[Del Rey]] for the United States on [[October 10]], 1995.<ref name="Amazon-Del Rey" /> [[Modern Graphics Distribution]] released a German-language edition in [[1996]].<ref name="Amazon-German" />

Boxtree also released a [[Star Wars Technical Journal Collector's Edition|Collector's Edition]] hardcover version for the UK in 1996.<ref name="Amazon-Collectors">{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Technical-Manual/dp/0752203916|text="Star Wars" Technical Manual}}</ref>
